'''malumu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:maomao|maomao]] (bear-sized companion)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-l-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:maomao|maomao]] (bear-sized companion)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| malumu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mælimith|mælimith]] || [[word:mælimij|mælimij]] || [[word:mælimish|mælimish]] || [[word:mælimi|mælimi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:malulumuth|malulumuth]] || [[word:malulumuj|malulumuj]] || [[word:malulumush|malulumush]] || [[word:malulumu|malulumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:malumuth|malumuth]] || [[word:malumuj|malumuj]] || [[word:malumush|malumush]] || [[word:malumu|malumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:malufmuth|malufmuth]] || [[word:malufmuj|malufmuj]] || [[word:malufmush|malufmush]] || [[word:malufmuf|malufmuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:malumuthu|malumuthu]] || [[word:malumuju|malumuju]] || [[word:malumushu|malumushu]] || [[word:malumuku|malumuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:malumuth|malumuth]] || [[word:malumuj|malumuj]] || [[word:malumush|malumush]] || [[word:malumu|malumu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:malumuthul|malumuthul]] || [[word:malumujul|malumujul]] || [[word:malumushul|malumushul]] || [[word:malumukul|malumukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:malumuthuthu|malumuthuthu]] || [[word:malumujuju|malumujuju]] || [[word:malumushushu|malumushushu]] || [[word:malumuku|malumuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:malumuthun|malumuthun]] || [[word:malumujun|malumujun]] || [[word:malumushun|malumushun]] || [[word:malumukun|malumukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:malumuthuoro|malumuthuoro]] || [[word:malumujuoro|malumujuoro]] || [[word:malumushuoro|malumushuoro]] || [[word:malumukuoro|malumukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
